userGroups.dailyValueTargetGroupName: Adults and children 4 or more years of age
userGroups.langualCodeDescription: Adults and Children 4 years and above

activeIngredients.name: Vitamin B12
activeIngredients.notes: Vitamin B-12 (Form: as Cyanocobalamin) Note: 5,000 mcg

statements.notes: SUGGESTED USAGE: As a dietary supplement, take one lozenge daily. Chew lozenge or hold in mouth until dissolved. Consider taking this product in combination with NOW(R) B-Complex, Folic Acid, B-6 and TMG.
*These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.
The B-12 content is derived by natural fermentation.
Contains no salt, starch, yeast, wheat, gluten, milk, egg, shellfish or preservatives.
Store in a cool, dry place.

Vitamin B-12 (Cyanocobalamin) is a water soluble vitamin necessary for the maintenance of a healthy nervous system and for the metabolic utilization of fats and proteins. Vitamin B-12 is also essential for the synthesis of DNA during cell division and therefore is especially important for rapidly multiplying cells, such as blood cells. In addition, adequate intake of Vitamin B-12, along with Folic Acid and Vitamin B-6, encourages healthy serum homocysteine levels, thereby supporting cardiovascular health. Because Vitamin B-12 is found predominantly in animal products, strict vegetarians are at risk of developing Vitamin B-12 deficiency and may benefit from supplementation.*
Do Not Eat Freshness Packet. Keep in Bottle.

Made in the U.S.A.
ACTUAL SIZE
